name: Image Label
description: Add whatever image you want while playing

image.name: Image (gif, png, jpg, jpeg, webp)
image.description: Your image. Whatever size or resolution you want

pbutton.name: Settings in pause menu
pbutton.description: Show a button to change the settings in the pause menu

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: The scale you want your image to be

posx.name: Position (X)
posx.description: Horizontal position. 0% = left border, 100% = right border

posy.name: Position (Y)
posy.description: Vertical position. 0% = bottom border, 100% = top border

opacity.name: Opacity
opacity.description: How transparent you want your image to be

rotation.name: Rotation
rotation.description: How many degrees you want your image to be rotated

enable-input.name: Enable Input Image (optional)
enable-input.description: Show alternate image while holding jump

input-image.name: Input Image (gif, png, jpg, jpeg, webp)
input-image.description: Image shown while holding jump input

input-scale.name: Input Scale
input-scale.description: The scale you want your input image to be

input-posx.name: Input Position (X)
input-posx.description: Horizontal position. 0% = left border, 100% = right border

input-posy.name: Input Position (Y)
input-posy.description: Vertical position. 0% = bottom border, 100% = top border

input-opacity.name: Input Opacity
input-opacity.description: How transparent you want your input image to be

input-rotation.name: Input Rotation
input-rotation.description: How many degrees you want your input image to be rotated
